message:
🌱 Add cilium: CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers mission (#1388)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "cilium-21438-cfp-support-proxy-protocol-from-external-loadbalancers",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "cilium: CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers",
+    "description": "CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers. Requested by 16+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current cilium deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your cilium version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nhelm list -n cilium 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working cilium installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review cilium configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant cilium configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get configmap -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cilium\n```\n## Cilium Feature Proposal\n\nSome Load Balancing solutions, such as Hetzner's LoadBalancer and AWS' Classic Load Balancer are using the [HAProxy Proxy Protocol](https://www.haproxy.org/download/1.8/doc/proxy-protocol.txt) to pass source IP"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers",
+        "description": "Adds support for proxy protocol in listeners using https://www.envoyproxy.io/docs/envoy/latest/configuration/listeners/listener_filters/proxy_protocol\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cilium -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cilium\nkubectl get events -n cilium --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"CFP: Support PROXY Protocol from external LoadBalancers\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Adds support for proxy protocol in listeners using https://www.envoyproxy.io/docs/envoy/latest/configuration/listeners/listener_filters/proxy_protocol",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
